CONTENT.Honours: Belgian Cup: 2015–16Belgian First Division: 2016–17Belgian Super Cup: 2017RSC Anderlecht Player of the Season: 2017-18
CONTENT.Club career: Trebel is a youth exponent from Nantes. He made his Ligue 2 debut at 10 February 2011 against Vannes OC replacing Ismaël Keïta after 72 minutes in a 1–0 away defeat. In 2014, he joined Belgian Pro League side Standard Liège. In January 2017, he joined Anderlecht.On 31 January 2022, Trebel was loaned to Lausanne-Sport in Switzerland.On 22 August 2023, Trebel signed a one-season contract with Charleroi.
CONTENT.External links: Adrien Trebel at L'Équipe Football (in French)Adrien Trebel – UEFA competition record (archive)
CONTENT.International career: Born in France, Trebel is of Malagasy descent through his mother. He was a youth international for the France U20. He was called up to the Madagascar national team for a set of friendlies in October 2023.

SUMMARY: Adrien Trebel (born 3 March 1991) is a French professional footballer who plays as a midfielder.
